reviews.review_text: The food was very good the service was amazing good conversation and amazing drinks #bestservers
Omar was amazing
Fatima morales did an amazing job we will definitely be back.
Fatima morales did an amazing job we will definitely be back.
Excellent service from Fatima

We had such a great experience, and our server, Fatima Rios was amazing! She was so kind, attentive, and made sure everything was perfect from start to finish. You can tell she truly cares about her guests. Thank you for making our visit so enjoyable!

From the moment you arrive at Mi Lindo San Blas, it’s clear this is more than just another Mexican restaurant — it’s an experience built around atmosphere, hospitality, and authentic flavor. The exterior immediately stands out with vibrant character and thoughtful architectural detail, while the interior delivers an immersive dining environment that feels warm, energetic, and genuinely transportive. Every aspect of the décor appears intentionally designed to create an inviting and memorable atmosphere, and the restaurant succeeds effortlessly in doing so.

One of the first touches that elevated the experience was the complimentary chips and salsa. While many restaurants treat this as a routine starter, Mi Lindo San Blas delivers freshness and flavor that immediately set the tone for the meal ahead. It’s a small detail, but one that reflects the kitchen’s attention to quality from the very beginning.

The menu itself is impressively expansive, offering an enormous variety of authentic Mexican dishes alongside an equally strong drink selection. Despite the size of the menu, nothing about the experience felt unfocused or overwhelming. Instead, it showcased the restaurant’s versatility and commitment to offering something for every palate.

Service throughout the evening was excellent. Our waitress was exceptionally friendly, attentive, and welcoming without ever feeling intrusive. The staff contributed heavily to the relaxed and enjoyable energy of the restaurant, making the experience feel both comfortable and genuinely hospitable.

The food arrived beautifully presented and cooked with precision. Every dish was packed with bold, authentic flavor, with ingredients tasting fresh and thoughtfully prepared. The kitchen clearly understands balance and seasoning, delivering meals that felt both satisfying and carefully executed rather than rushed or overly commercialized.

The cocktail program deserves recognition as well. The drinks were creative, well-balanced, and expertly poured — visually appealing while still delivering on flavor. It’s evident that the bar program receives the same level of care and consistency as the kitchen.

What ultimately makes Mi Lindo San Blas stand out is its ability to combine strong food, excellent drinks, inviting atmosphere, and warm hospitality into one cohesive experience. In a dining landscape where many restaurants excel in one category while neglecting another, this establishment manages to deliver across the board.

Anyone in the Lincoln Park area looking for authentic Mexican cuisine in a vibrant and memorable setting should absolutely make time to visit Mi Lindo San Blas. My wife and I left thoroughly impressed and are already looking forward to returning.

We had such a great experience, and our server, Fatima Rios was amazing! She was so kind, attentive, and made sure everything was perfect from start to finish. You can tell she truly cares about her guests. Thank you for making our visit so enjoyable!

This was our first experience here, & it was wonderful. Not too busy, the dining room is clean and fun to look at.. Our server Fatima, was amazing. She let us take our time with the HUGE menu, was quick to ask us if we wanted a drink from the bar & got them while we browsed the options for food. 10/10 experience for a friday night dinner with my husband.
Had some delicious chicken and pork tacos. I'll certainly be going back very soon to try some more stuff. My waitress Rios was very politico and informative on their Tuesday special.
Everything was amazing from the moment we walked in. You have to try the birria tacos.

The food was great. A little too spicy for me but great flavor, good portions, and the waitress Rios was a very sweet girl. Bathrooms were pristine! I will return to try something a little less picoso :)
The food was very good the service was amazing good conversation and amazing drinks #bestservers

I live around the block from this place and have never gone until today (Cinco De Mayo) and let me tell you.... WHAT WAS I THINKING!?!??! This place is all that and a bag of chips. The menu was a little overwhelming but that is never a bad thing. Has great options for everyone and their drinks just taste better. I dont know if it is freshness or the care they made the drinks with but I was blow away! Please please please come in and let this place do the talking!

My favorite Mexican restaurant. 🥰
This is some of the best Mexican food I have had in a long time. The birria tacos were outstanding.  Love the Souza sauce also.  Cute atmosphere!!

Excellent service from Fatima
First thing to catch your eye is the decor. Second is the smiling, welcoming staff.  EXCELLENT SERVICE,  Amazing food. All around cool place. Shout out to Linda for the great service and suggestions!
The food was very good the service was amazing good conversation and amazing drinks #bestservers
Our  server Rios was amazing!

We had such a great experience, and our server, Fatima Rios was amazing! She was so kind, attentive, and made sure everything was perfect from start to finish. You can tell she truly cares about her guests. Thank you for making our visit so enjoyable!

I've adjusted my rating down to 1 star at this point.

After posting my original review, I received a response asking me to reach out so they could make things right. I did exactly that on June 3rd, and as of today, June 8th, I have not received any response or follow-up.

Unfortunately, the lack of communication and customer service has made it clear that our business is not valued. I sincerely hope you take steps to improve the experience for future guests; otherwise, you may continue to lose customers. To make matters worse, all of this stems from a $45 crab meal and one additional entrée. After leaving a generous tip, our total came to approximately $85. Based on this experience and the way the situation has been handled, we will not be ordering from this establishment again. Take care.

Update 5/31/2026
I've decided to update my review because I feel the quality of this restaurant has declined.

Ever since I first tried the crab legs, I've been a loyal customer, ordering them at least once a month. Up until now, they've been consistently good. This time, however, I placed an online order and was very disappointed. When I opened my meal, the sauce tasted completely different than usual. It was extremely oily, lacked flavor, and did not resemble what I've received in the past.

I also paid for extra cucumbers but received very few. Despite tipping well and spending approximately $85 on the order, the overall experience fell far short of expectations.

I called the restaurant right away and was told that the cooks prepared the meal the same way they always do. I explained that the taste was noticeably off, but my concerns weren't really addressed. I then spent several days trying to reach someone and wasn't able to speak with anyone until three days later.

At first, it seemed like the situation would be resolved with a replacement meal. Instead, I was offered a discount on a future order. As someone who has consistently supported this business, recommended it to friends and family, and returned month after month, being offered only a discount felt disappointing and dismissive.

I don't enjoy leaving negative reviews, especially for a place I've genuinely enjoyed for so long, but this experience left me feeling undervalued as a loyal customer.

3/6/26 Angel & Mayra make the best crab legs I have ever had. Omar & Fatima are always so kind, quick and attentive. Will come back again and again because of the quality of the food and the service here. Never been so comfortable in a restaurant! 😊

Update: Came up this evening, and Yasmine took care of us. She was amazing and so attentive. She knows what she is doing and gave us the best experience here!

Update: I came back to try the crab legs, and they did not disappoint. It was the most flavorful I've ever had! This is officially our new favorite place!

This place is gorgeous! Right when you walk in, you notice that it's colorful and well decorated. The bar is beautiful and lights up nice. A lot of wows walking in. Comfortable and warm environment with nice employees. Fabian was who served us, and he did great!  Didn't wait long for our food at all. The prices aren't bad whatsoever. There is so much to choose from on the menu. A lot of phenomenal looking drinks, too. I ordered the steak fajita quesadilla. 10/10 - by far, the best quesadilla I have ever had. My man had the carnitas. Those were outstanding, too! 10/10, everything tasted flavorful and perfect. Will most definitely be back to try the crab legs!! 🦀 Their cheese dip is pretty good, too. 10/10 You won't be disappointed coming to this place. We enjoyed our experience and will tell about it to all!

I've adjusted my rating down to 1 star at this point.

This time, however, I placed an online order and was very disappointed. When I opened my meal, the sauce tasted completely different than usual. It was extremely oily, lacked flavor, and did not resemble what I've received in the past.

I also paid for extra cucumbers but received very few. Despite tipping well and spending approximately $85 on the order, the overall experience fell far short of expectations.

I called the restaurant right away and was told that the cooks prepared the meal the same way they always do. I explained that the taste was noticeably off, but my concerns weren't really addressed. I then spent several days trying to reach someone and wasn't able to speak with anyone until three days later.

At first, it seemed like the situation would be resolved with a replacement meal. Instead, I was offered a discount on a future order. As someone who has consistently supported this business, recommended it to friends and family, and returned month after month, being offered only a discount felt disappointing and dismissive.

I don't enjoy leaving negative reviews, especially for a place I've genuinely enjoyed for so long, but this experience left me feeling undervalued as a loyal customer.

3/6/26 Angel & Mayra make the best crab legs I have ever had. Omar & Fatima are always so kind, quick and attentive. Will come back again and again because of the quality of the food and the service here. Never been so comfortable in a restaurant! 😊

Update: Came up this evening, and Yasmine took care of us. She was amazing and so attentive. She knows what she is doing and gave us the best experience here!

Update: I came back to try the crab legs, and they did not disappoint. It was the most flavorful I've ever had! This is officially our new favorite place!

This place is gorgeous! Right when you walk in, you notice that it's colorful and well decorated. The bar is beautiful and lights up nice. A lot of wows walking in. Comfortable and warm environment with nice employees. Fabian was who served us, and he did great!  Didn't wait long for our food at all. The prices aren't bad whatsoever. There is so much to choose from on the menu. A lot of phenomenal looking drinks, too. I ordered the steak fajita quesadilla. 10/10 - by far, the best quesadilla I have ever had. My man had the carnitas. Those were outstanding, too! 10/10, everything tasted flavorful and perfect. Will most definitely be back to try the crab legs!! 🦀 Their cheese dip is pretty good, too. 10/10 You won't be disappointed coming to this place. We enjoyed our experience and will tell about it to all!

I've adjusted my rating down to 1 star at this point.

After posting my original review, I received a response asking me to reach out so they could make things right. I did exactly that on June 3rd, and as of today, June 8th, I have not received any response or follow-up.

Unfortunately, the lack of communication and customer service has made it clear that our business is not valued. I sincerely hope you take steps to improve the experience for future guests; otherwise, you may continue to lose customers. To make matters worse, all of this stems from a $45 crab meal and one additional entrée. After leaving a generous tip, our total came to approximately $85. Based on this experience and the way the situation has been handled, we will not be ordering from this establishment again. Take care.

Our  server Rios was amazing!
As always Linda was amazing!

Linda was our waitress tonight, and she was truly amazing! Despite our large party, she remained attentive, friendly, and professional throughout the evening. She checked on us frequently and made sure we had everything we needed. Her excellent service made our night even more enjoyable!

From the moment you arrive at Mi Lindo San Blas, it’s clear this is more than just another Mexican restaurant — it’s an experience built around atmosphere, hospitality, and authentic flavor. The exterior immediately stands out with vibrant character and thoughtful architectural detail, while the interior delivers an immersive dining environment that feels warm, energetic, and genuinely transportive. Every aspect of the décor appears intentionally designed to create an inviting and memorable atmosphere, and the restaurant succeeds effortlessly in doing so.

One of the first touches that elevated the experience was the complimentary chips and salsa. While many restaurants treat this as a routine starter, Mi Lindo San Blas delivers freshness and flavor that immediately set the tone for the meal ahead. It’s a small detail, but one that reflects the kitchen’s attention to quality from the very beginning.

The menu itself is impressively expansive, offering an enormous variety of authentic Mexican dishes alongside an equally strong drink selection. Despite the size of the menu, nothing about the experience felt unfocused or overwhelming. Instead, it showcased the restaurant’s versatility and commitment to offering something for every palate.

Service throughout the evening was excellent. Our waitress was exceptionally friendly, attentive, and welcoming without ever feeling intrusive. The staff contributed heavily to the relaxed and enjoyable energy of the restaurant, making the experience feel both comfortable and genuinely hospitable.

The food arrived beautifully presented and cooked with precision. Every dish was packed with bold, authentic flavor, with ingredients tasting fresh and thoughtfully prepared. The kitchen clearly understands balance and seasoning, delivering meals that felt both satisfying and carefully executed rather than rushed or overly commercialized.

The cocktail program deserves recognition as well. The drinks were creative, well-balanced, and expertly poured — visually appealing while still delivering on flavor. It’s evident that the bar program receives the same level of care and consistency as the kitchen.

What ultimately makes Mi Lindo San Blas stand out is its ability to combine strong food, excellent drinks, inviting atmosphere, and warm hospitality into one cohesive experience. In a dining landscape where many restaurants excel in one category while neglecting another, this establishment manages to deliver across the board.

Anyone in the Lincoln Park area looking for authentic Mexican cuisine in a vibrant and memorable setting should absolutely make time to visit Mi Lindo San Blas. My wife and I left thoroughly impressed and are already looking forward to returning.

I live around the block from this place and have never gone until today (Cinco De Mayo) and let me tell you.... WHAT WAS I THINKING!?!??! This place is all that and a bag of chips. The menu was a little overwhelming but that is never a bad thing. Has great options for everyone and their drinks just taste better. I dont know if it is freshness or the care they made the drinks with but I was blow away! Please please please come in and let this place do the talking!
Everything was amazing from the moment we walked in. You have to try the birria tacos.
This is some of the best Mexican food I have had in a long time. The birria tacos were outstanding.  Love the Souza sauce also.  Cute atmosphere!!
